title: Iran Threatens Ships Over Trump Plan to Break Iran’s Blockade
summary_full: A senior Iranian military official warned that any vessel that tries to cross the Strait of Hormuz without permission would be “at risk.”
summary_public: A senior Iranian military official warned that any vessel that tries to cross the Strait of Hormuz without permission would be “at risk.”

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: any vessel that tries to cross the Strait of Hormuz without permission would be “at risk.”
